UW-16  MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS FOR ATTACHMENT WELDS AT OPENINGS. (a) Nozzle-to-shell and nozzle-to-head attachment welds shall have a minimum throat dimension as specified in this paragraph. (b) The weld shall develop the strength required to resist the design loads of UG-22 and shall not be less than the minimum specified herein. Fillet weld dimensions shall comply with UW-35. (c) For nozzle reinforcement, see UG-37 and UG-40. Nozzle neck thickness shall be as required by UG-44. Nozzle attachment details shall be in accordance with UW-49. Examination of attachment welds shall be performed per UW-11, unless exempted by UW-52 for spot examination.
